channel.title: Techtonic Times
channel.description: Latest technology, science, and future tech news

item.title: AI Export Controls: New US Limits on Frontier AI Models and What They Mean for Global Markets in 2026
item.description: New AI export controls could reshape the global AI market as US restrictions expand across advanced models and computing resources. See 2026 roadmap
item.author: Mir Mushfikur Rahman

item.title: Apple AI Features Signal a New Era for iPhone AI in 2026
item.description: Apple AI features process more tasks on device in 2026, according to Apple, improving privacy and response speed. Read full analysis.
item.author: Mir Mushfikur Rahman

item.title: GPT-5.6 and AI App Development: How Native AI Systems Are Reshaping Modern Software Engineering
item.description: As GPT-5.6 expands AI-native features across apps in 2026, AI app development is reshaping software markets and product strategy. See 2026 roadmap.
item.author: businesscontact1107@gmail.com (Mir Mushfikur Rahman)

item.title: China's Asteroid Probe Rewrites Origin Model With 2026 Data
item.description: China's asteroid probe returned samples that challenge earlier origin models, based on 2026 mission findings. New asteroid analysis could reshape planetary science. Read full analysis.
item.author: businesscontact1107@gmail.com (Mir Mushfikur Rahman)

item.title: Glioblastoma Treatment Targets Brain Cancer on Two Fronts
item.description: A 2026 preclinical study reports dual targeting improved tumor control in glioblastoma treatment by attacking two pathways. Read full analysis.
item.author: businesscontact1107@gmail.com (Mir Mushfikur Rahman)

item.title: Glioblastoma Treatment Targets Brain Cancer on Two Fronts
item.description: A 2026 preclinical study reports dual targeting improved tumor control in glioblastoma treatment by attacking two pathways. Read full analysis.

item.title: Could a Coin-Sized Quantum Computer Change Everything?
item.description: Could one material unlock a coin-sized quantum computer? Find out why researchers believe this quantum computing breakthrough may change chip design.
item.author: businesscontact1107@gmail.com (Mir Mushfikur Rahman)

item.title: Synthetic Cell Breakthrough Could Rewrite Biology Rules
item.description: Explore the synthetic cell breakthrough and how engineered cells could reshape synthetic biology and medical research. Discover how this milestone matters.
item.author: businesscontact1107@gmail.com (Mir Mushfikur Rahman)

item.title: NASA Telescope Rescue Could Redefine How Future Space Missions Save Aging Observatories in Orbit
item.description: Could a risky orbital repair change the future of space missions? Learn how the NASA telescope rescue revived a failing observatory. Find out why.
item.author: businesscontact1107@gmail.com (Mir Mushfikur Rahman)

item.title: European Heatwave Pushes Heat Dome to Dangerous Extremes
item.description: Why is the European heatwave lasting so long? Learn how a stubborn heat dome traps hot air, fuels extreme weather, and reshapes climate risks. Find out why.
item.author: businesscontact1107@gmail.com (Mir Mushfikur Rahman)

item.title: AI Passed Medical Exams With Ease, Yet Medical AI Outcomes Still Failed to Improve Real Patient Care
item.description: Why do medical AI outcomes excel on tests yet struggle with patient outcomes? Learn what real world evidence reveals. Find out why.
item.author: businesscontact1107@gmail.com (Mir Mushfikur Rahman)

item.title: Are AI Chips About to Overtake Models in the AI Race?
item.description: Could AI chips matter more than bigger models? Explore the hardware revolution driving machine learning performance and find out why experts are watching.

item.title: Can DNA Data Storage Save Us Before Silicon Runs Out?
item.description: Could DNA data storage replace parts of today's cloud infrastructure before silicon runs out? Find out why researchers see growing potential.

item.title: Why AI Data Centers Are Racing Into Space
item.description: Why are AI data centers heading into space? Discover how orbital computing, satellite infrastructure, and energy demands could reshape AI. Read more.

item.title: Is AI Deskilling Doctors and Coders More Than We Realize?
item.description: Is AI quietly reducing human expertise? Research on AI deskilling doctors coders raises questions about skill erosion and decision-making. Find out why.

item.title: Solar Cell Breakthrough Could Upend a Critical Material Challenge
item.description: Why has a scarce metal limited solar innovation for years? Learn how a solar cell breakthrough addresses this challenge and what it means for clean energy.

item.title: Nuclear Clock Dark Matter Hunt Could Challenge Physics
item.description: Could a nuclear clock detect hidden dark matter signals? Discover how this breakthrough may challenge physics and advance quantum measurement.

item.title: Could Quantum Sensors Replace GPS? NASA Thinks So
item.description: Could quantum sensors replace GPS when signals fail? Discover how quantum navigation and space-based research may change positioning forever.

item.title: Is In Vivo Gene Editing Medicine the Start of a Healthcare Shift?
item.description: Could in vivo gene editing medicine change healthcare forever? Discover how genetic medicine now edits DNA inside the body and what comes next.

item.title: Humanoid Robots Workforce Shift Could Arrive Faster Than Expected
item.description: Will the humanoid robots workforce create opportunity or disruption? Learn what the 2026 deployment means for automation, jobs, and industry.

item.title: Is This Quantum Computing Breakthrough Ending the Error Problem?

item.title: NASA's X-59 Could End Sonic Booms. Really?

item.title: Can Biocomputing AI Energy Crisis Be Solved by Brain Cells?

item.title: First Human Trial Tests Whether Cell Rejuvenation Can Reverse Aging

item.title: Is Natural Hydrogen the Missing Piece of the Energy Transition?
